---
title: "About"
---

Hello, my name is Javier.\
\
Here is a short introduction about me and this website.\
\
This website showcases my coursework for \*\*ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications\*\* at SMU.\
\
You will find materials including:\
\
- Hands-on exercises\
- In-class exercises\
- Take-home assignments\
- Group project work\
\
The goal of this website is to document my learning journey in data visualization, analytics, and storytelling with data.
